passives.name: Guiding Light
passives.effects: Upon casting your [[champion ability|ultimate]], you ''Transcend'' for 9 seconds. While ''Transcended'', increase your {{as|'''maximum''' health by {{fd|12.5}}%}} and cause you and all allies within {{tip|cr|icononly=true}} 1200 units to {{tip|heal}} for {{as|{{fd|3}}% of your '''maximum''' health}} upon you ''Transcending'' and every 3 seconds thereafter, for a total healing of {{as|{{ap|3*4}}% of your '''maximum''' health}}.

effects_structured.raw: On ultimate cast, you Transcend for 9 seconds (30s cooldown).
While Transcended, increase max health by 12.5%.
On Transcend start and every 3 seconds for 9 seconds, you and allies within 1200 units heal for 3% of your max health.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Economy representation note: Tier-1 datasets expose distributed-item gold fields (total 1000 / sell 400); these values are retained for reconciliation while acquisition remains Prismatic Item Anvil/mode-scoped rather than standard shop purchase.

Execution-semantics review: Guiding Light starts on ultimate cast, applies Transcend immediately, then heals on start plus every 3 seconds (4 total ticks over 9 seconds) within 1200 range based on the user's max health.
Mode-availability note: Radiant Virtue is a distributed/prismatic Arena item obtained via Prismatic Item Anvils when Arena is active.

sources.name: Data Dragon item dataset
sources.used_for: baseline item identity, stat block, and raw effect text

sources.name: CommunityDragon items dataset
sources.used_for: secondary validation against canonical static item data mirror
local ingestion snapshot used during structured effect authoring

sources.name: League of Legends Wiki - Radiant Virtue
sources.used_for: page-level verification of Transcend duration, max-health modifier, periodic-heal cadence, Arena exclusivity, and displayed cost/sell fields
